analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒波動較大，受中國DeepSeek事件影響，美國股市大幅下跌，納斯達克指數領跌。同時，倫敦黃金交易所的金價和銀價分別下跌1.4%和2.5%。然而，人工智能大爆發仍然是市場關注的焦點，Micron和Intel的股價上漲超過200%。另外，零售商競爭加劇，送貨速度成為關鍵優勢。

【結語】
投資者務必保持冷靜，避免因短期市場波動而做出錯誤的決定。同時，應該關注公司的基本面，包括財務表現、業績分析和未來發展策略。投資者也應該多元化投資，避免將孩子的財務未來完全押在美國股票上。

【精選個股】
NVIDIA - NVIDIA公司 - AI基礎設施製造商股價大幅下跌，可能是買入機會。
BLOOM ENERGY - Bloom Energy公司 - 公司擴大戰略夥伴關係，股價大幅上漲，可能是投資熱潮的開始。
WALMART - 沃爾瑪公司 - 整體履行模式最強，但亞馬遜Now在純粹的送貨速度方面領先。

風險提醒：投資者應該謹慎評估公司的基本面和市場情況，避免因風險而損失投資。

items.title: Micron vs. Intel: Which AI Stock Is the Better Buy?
items.summary: Micron and Intel are both up by more than 200% year to date, but one of them offers more upside right now.
items.zh_title: Micron vs. Intel：哪一家AI股是更好的買賣？
items.zh_point: Micron和Intel今年已經上漲超過200%，但其中一家現在提供更大的潛力。

items.title: Forget College? The AI Boom Is Creating a New Generation of Six-Figure Trade Jobs
items.summary: On Fox Business’s The Bottom Line this week, Mike Rowe told viewers: “You cannot reinvigorate the trades without reimagining the way we train the next generation of workers. These jobs by and large exist out of sight and out of mind, so people are surprised to learn they exist and shocked to learn they represent ... Forget College? The AI Boom Is Creating a New Generation of Six-Figure Trade Jobs
items.zh_title: AI 大爆發正在創造一代六位數工匠崛起
items.zh_point: 人工智能大爆發帶動工匠崛起，六位數工資成為新趨勢，對於未來工人培訓的重視也逐漸增強。

items.title: Why Owens Corning Stock Rocked the Market This Week
items.summary: A suitor is apparently willing to pay more than $10 billion to acquire the storied building-materials company.
items.zh_title: 奧雲斯康寧股價大幅波動 這周市場震盪
items.zh_point: 據報導，一家公司願意以超過 1000 億元購買奧雲斯康寧，該公司是一家傳統的建材公司。

items.title: Could Investing $10,000 in Bloom Energy Make You a Millionaire?
items.summary: Bloom Energy catapulted higher after announcing an expansion to a strategic partnership. Can this be the beginning of another fantastic run?
items.zh_title: 投資 10,000 美元在 Bloom Energy 是否能讓你變成百萬富翁？
items.zh_point: Bloom Energy 宣布擴大戰略夥伴關係，股價大幅上漲。這是否將是另一波投資熱潮的開始？

items.title: Which Retailer Can Deliver My Order the Fastest?
items.summary: Investing.com -- Delivery speed is emerging as a key competitive advantage for retailers as AI-powered shopping assistants become more common, with Morgan Stanley’s latest analysis finding Walmart offers the strongest overall fulfillment model. At the same time, Amazon Now leads on raw delivery speed.
items.zh_title: 哪家零售商能最快送貨到我手上？
items.zh_point: 投資網站Investing.com指出，隨著人工智慧購物助手的普及，送貨速度已經成為零售商競爭的關鍵優勢。摩根士丹利的最新分析發現，沃爾瑪的整體履行模式最強，但亞馬遜Now在純粹的送貨速度方面領先。

items.title: Feds seek lower prison term for $100M New Jersey deli fraudster — but some reasons why are hidden
items.summary: James Patten is the third person who will be sentenced in the stock manipulation scheme related to Hometown International, a company that owned just one deli.
items.zh_title: 聯邦檢方要求紐澤西百萬美元餐館詐欺犯減刑 — 但有些理由被隱藏
items.zh_point: 聯邦檢方要求紐澤西一名涉及一家餐館公司股票操縱案的詐欺犯減刑，該案涉及一家僅擁有一家餐館的公司。

items.title: Extreme heat wave threatens U.S. power grids and July 4 travel
items.summary: The heat wave threatens to overwhelm U.S. grids and may force some to change their plans on one of the busiest travel weeks of the year.
items.zh_title: 極端高溫波潮威脅美國電力網路和七月四日旅遊
items.zh_point: 美國正面臨嚴重高溫波潮，可能導致電力網路過載和旅遊計畫變更，尤其是在今年最繁忙的旅遊週之一。

items.title: Largest U.S. power grid PJM escalates emergency actions to avoid blackouts
items.summary: PJM ​said ​it was ​under a federal alert to cut electricity consumption. It serves 67 million people ⁠in the Mid-Atlantic, South and Washington, D.C., area.
items.zh_title: 美國最大電力網 PJM 加強緊急措施防止停電
items.zh_point: 美國最大電力網 PJM 因應熱浪，已經接到聯邦政府的緊急通知，要求降低電力消耗，為近 6,700 萬人提供服務的地區包括中大西洋、南方及華盛頓特區。

items.title: First known congressional SpaceX stock buys surface after record IPO
items.summary: The SpaceX stock purchases come as Elon Musk’s company deepens its role in federal contracting and remains closely tied to President Donald Trump’s Washington.
items.zh_title: SpaceX 股票買賣案件浮現出來，與特朗普政府關係密切
items.zh_point: SpaceX 股票買賣案件浮現出來，顯示該公司正深入參與聯邦政府合約，並與前總統特朗普的華盛頓關係密切。

items.title: American Express and Chase move luxury lounge wars beyond the airport
items.summary: Credit card companies are increasingly offering access to lounges and perks at festivals and sporting events, often exclusively for premium cardholders.
items.zh_title: 美國運通和徵信卡進軍豪華休息室戰爭
items.zh_point: 信用卡公司正越來越多地提供給高級卡戶免費入住豪華休息室的機會，不僅限於機場，還包括音樂節和體育賽事。

items.title: Here’s what’s worth streaming in July 2026 on Netflix, Hulu, HBO Max and more
items.summary: Why it’s a good month to save on streaming, despite the return of ‘Enola Holmes’ to Netflix and ‘Silo’ to Apple
items.zh_title: 7月2026年 Netflix、Hulu、HBO Max 等平台上的值得流覽內容
items.zh_point: 7月2026年雖然Netflix和Apple TV+會推出新內容，但仍是節省流媒體費用的好時機。

items.title: Record beef imports are flooding the U.S. — so why is your Fourth of July BBQ so expensive?
items.summary: Beef prices are sizzling and Washington’s recipe for high costs — import more meat — only grills your wallet.
items.zh_title: 第四七日烤肉盛宴：美國牛肉進口創新高，為什麼你的烤肉費用卻不斷上漲？
items.zh_point: 美國牛肉進口量創新高，但卻使烤肉費用不斷上漲，原因何在？

items.title: Your aging parent has a new romance. Here’s how to protect your inheritance — without looking greedy.
items.summary: Before your single mom or dad remarries, talk with them about estate-planning issues.
items.zh_title: 你的父母再婚了，如何保護你的遺產？
items.zh_point: 父母再婚前，與他們討論遺產規劃問題，避免被視為貪婪。

items.title: Opening a ‘Trump account’ for your children? Here is the risk you need to reckon with first.
items.summary: The new accounts ban bonds and international stocks, forcing parents to bet their children’s financial future entirely on U.S. equities.
items.zh_title: 為孩子開設「川普賬戶」？你需要先面對的風險
items.zh_point: 為了避免風險，父母應該考慮多元化投資，避免將孩子的財務未來完全押在美國股票上。

items.title: ‘I don’t think I’ll make it to 80’: I’m 70 and single. Do I take out a reverse mortgage or a home-equity agreement?
items.summary: “I’m torn between these two options.”
items.zh_title: 七旬單身，該選擇逆向抵押貸款還是房屋抵押貸款？
items.zh_point: 一位七旬單身老人面臨著財務困境，猶豫不決地選擇逆向抵押貸款或房屋抵押貸款，尋求專家的建議以確保未來的財務安全。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下跌，受中國DeepSeek事件影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大部分下跌，納斯達克指數領跌，AI基礎設施製造商股價大幅下跌，Nvidia股價下跌16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 倫敦黃金交易所金、銀價格下跌
items.zh_point: 倫敦黃金交易所的金價和銀價分別下跌1.4%和2.5%，連續兩天和三天下跌。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的要點
items.zh_point: 中國新興企業宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，但不需要使用最先進的晶片，成本大大降低。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度探索不會讓美國AI巨頭沉沒
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭股價大幅下跌的恐慌情緒可能過度膨脹。

items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與電信新聞回顧：市場話題
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi等公司在科技、媒體和電信領域的最新發展，包括市場趨勢、投資機會和產業動態等。

items.zh_title: FHFA房價指數回落至歷史新高
items.zh_point: 美國房價指數由歷史新高回落，可能與房市調控政策或經濟情況變化有關。

items.title: Trump pardons 11, most for violating Clean Air Act

items.title: Which Retailer Can Deliver My Order the Fastest?
